product.name: Kichler Jasper 32.25" Halogen Vanity Light in Chrome, 4-Light Mid Century Bahtroom Vanity with Satin Etched Cased Opal Glass, (32.25" W x 7.5" H), 45583CH
product.description: The Jasper 32.25" 4 light halogen vanity light features classic globe lighting paired with a tapered Chrome bar to create the ultimate Mid Century vanity light. The Jasper halogen vanity light works well in bathroom or powder room settings.
features: The 4 light Jasper halogen vanity light is perfect over a vanity sink in a bathroom or powder room.
The satin etched cased opal glass provides a beautiful, ambient or task light to the room.
What's in the Box: (1) Mounting Strap, Strap Mounting Screws, Mounting Screws, Wire Nuts and (4) Glass Globes. Bulb(s) not included.
What's in the Box: (1) Mounting Strap, Strap Mounting Screws, Mounting Screws, Wire Nuts and (4) Glass Globes. Bulb(s) not included.

Cleaning instructions: Be certain the electric current is turned off before cleaning. Clean metal components with a soft cloth moistened with a mild liquid soap solution. Wipe clean and buff with a very soft dry cloth.
Takes four G9 medium E26 up to 50W bulb equivalent
